name: Ambrosial Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop all ingredients finely.
2. Put the oranges through a food chopper.
3. Combine all ingredients with 3/4 cup sugar for every 1 cup of fruit.
4. Mix well and let stand overnight.
5. The next morning, gently cook the mixture for 1 hour, stirring frequently.
6. Pour into hot jars and seal.
7. Makes 8 pints.
